calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-14-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Amended Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Sunnatillo Mukhamadiev; (Proposed) Order
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
M. Frisher Esq. 818-990-0888 Law Offices of Kenneth J. Freed for Plaintiff.
John Bussman Esq. 800-385-2615 Absolute Law Group for Defendant.

ARGUED.
Mr. Frisher presents arguments; No answer served with the motion, the application shouldn't be granted, untimely manner, not adept in english language, excusable neglect, gross negligence.
Mr. Bussman responds and presents arguments; court has wide discretion to grant relief, client not proficient in english, could not answer on behalf of the corporation, maintain TR.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2 - DEFENDANTs EVOLVE EXECUTIVE CAR SERVICE SF, LLC AKA EVOLVE EXECUTIVE CAR SERVICE SF LLC Notice Amended Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant's Amended Motion to Set Aside Entry Default is GRANTED. Counsel to file answer fortwith before the close of business today. Moving Party to present an order for the Court's consideration.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)

Moton To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
M. Frisher Esq. 818-990-0888 Law Offices of Kenneth J. Freed for Plaintiff.
John Bussman Esq. 800-385-2615 Absolute Law Group for Defendant.

ARGUED.
Mr. Frisher presents arguments; No answer served with the motion, the application shouldn't be granted, untimely manner, not adept in english language, excusable neglect, gross negligence.
Mr. Bussman responds and presents arguments; court has wide discretion to grant relief, client not proficient in english, could not answer on behalf of the corporation, maintain TR.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - DEFENDANTs SUNNATILLO MUKHAMADIEV AND DBA EVOLVE EXECUTIVE CAR SERVICE SF LLC Moton To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant's Amended Motion to Set Aside Entry Default is GRANTED. Counsel to file answer fortwith before the close of business today. Moving Party to present an order for the Court's consideration.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
